name: Proxy Design Pattern
problem: Control access to an object by using a stand-in that can add validation, caching, logging, or lazy initialization.
steps: Define a subject interface shared by real subject and proxy.
Implement the real subject with core behavior.
Implement a proxy that holds a reference to the real subject.
Add access-control, caching, or lazy-load logic in the proxy.
Use the proxy in place of the real subject from client code.
